description: secretx-k8s/README.md. The README explains URI shape, write semantics, and auth resolution but never tells the operator which RBAC verbs they need to grant: 'get' on secrets for read; 'patch' and 'create' for write (with-key path); 'patch' (apply) and 'create' for write (no-key path SSA). Without this, every new operator deploys the backend, gets a Forbidden, and either files an issue or gives up. Fix: add an 'RBAC' section to README listing the exact rules.verbs needed per use case. Cross-link from the Auth section.
title: README does not document required RBAC verbs
